response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including Python, JavaScript, D, C/C++), and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of experimentation platforms, growth systems, or AI-driven measurement frameworks central to the role, with minimal mention of feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis of experiments.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to build and lead open-source platforms (GISCollective) with real-world adoption
Strong full-stack fluency across Python, JavaScript, C++, D, and cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Minimal mention of metrics infrastructure, guardrails, or statistical analysis for experiments
Lacks demonstrable cross-team leadership in growth or AI-driven decision systems as required for IC6
